title: Always Online
description: Keep your server online even if Mojang's auth server is down
body:
## Always Online

This server-side mod keeps your server still can be entered by caching player profiles if Mojang's auth server is down.

### Requirements

Your server is set `online-mode` to true (authlib-injector can also get benefits from this mod)

This mod requires `Fabric API` and `owo`!
